Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Giants Stadium
East Rutherford, NJ
Seating Capacity: 80242
Venue Type : Stadium

Total Gigs: 10
  DMB  (10)

Longest Performance:
07.13.00 - Seek Up (20:21)
Venue Picture
Description
Giants Stadium opened on October 10, 1976 with a game between the New York Giants and the Dallas Cowboys to a sell-out crowd of 76,042. Dallas won the game 24-14.

Both the New York Giants and the New York Jets played their home games in Giants Stadium, but the Jets referred to it as "The Meadowlands."

Giants Stadium was replaced by New Meadowlands Stadium in April 2010 and was demolished the following month.
